dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group. All agents had opportunity to respond.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Míriel, Narvi, Elanor. Orion Solarin did NOT respond within 60s window. 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct names (Míriel Goldthread, Narvi Irondeep, Elanor Brightloom), followed the 3-point format perfectly. Identity confusion from earlier runs remains fixed.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Míriel: 4.5s, Narvi: 6.0s, Elanor: 7.7s. Avg: 6.1s. Slightly slower than run #10 (4.2s avg). -4 points.

improvements: Sent direct follow-up to Orion in group chat calling out the missed response. Flagged all-idle status to the team.
issues: Orion Solarin failed to respond — first missed response after consistent participation in runs #8-10. Needs monitoring. All 4 agents continue to report idle/no active tasks. Average latency increased from 4.2s to 6.1s.
